properties.name: Above Howell Gage
properties.description: Upper basin above Howell Ranch gage. Source of natural flow for much of the system.
properties.source: WD34 Guidelines for Operation (2006) and IDWR Water Rights Accounting docs / Big Lost project materials. Approximate geometry for reference only.

properties.name: Howell Gage to 2-B Gage (Chilly Bridge area)
properties.description: Key upper accounting reach; includes Chilly sinks and major gains/losses.
properties.source: WD34 Guidelines for Operation (2006) and IDWR Water Rights Accounting docs / Big Lost project materials. Approximate geometry for reference only.

properties.name: 2-B Gage to Leslie Gage
properties.description: Mid-basin reach with tributary inputs (e.g. Antelope).
properties.source: WD34 Guidelines for Operation (2006) and IDWR Water Rights Accounting docs / Big Lost project materials. Approximate geometry for reference only.

properties.name: Leslie Gage to Moore Diversion
properties.description: Reach with significant irrigation diversions and losses.
properties.source: WD34 Guidelines for Operation (2006) and IDWR Water Rights Accounting docs / Big Lost project materials. Approximate geometry for reference only.

properties.name: Moore Diversion to Arco Diversion / Gage (13132500)
properties.description: Lower valley reach; critical for downstream flow extent. Many recent measurements show limited or no surface flow past Moore/Arco in dry periods.
properties.source: WD34 Guidelines for Operation (2006) and IDWR Water Rights Accounting docs / Big Lost project materials (incl. 2019-2021 seepage studies). Approximate geometry for reference only.

properties.name: Below Arco to Big Lost River Sinks (near Howe / Atomic City)
properties.description: Terminal reach on Snake River Plain. Surface flow often infiltrates before or at sinks (13132565). Rarely reaches full extent in recent records.
properties.source: WD34 Guidelines for Operation (2006) and IDWR Water Rights Accounting docs / Big Lost project materials / USGS reports. Approximate geometry for reference only.
